title: Organization
description: A Kinde organization — a tenant container inside a Kinde business used for B2B multi-tenancy. Organizations have their own users, roles, permissions, feature-flag overrides, and (on Scale plans) per-org SSO and properties.

code.description: Stable organization code used as the org identifier (e.g. org_a1b2c3).

external_id.description: Optional external id from the customer's system of record.

is_default.description: Whether this is the business's default organization.

is_allow_registrations.description: Whether new users can self-register into this organization.
